spec.long_desc: A massive cave bear rises from its nest, filling the den entrance with a wall of muscle and fur.
spec.detailed_desc: The bear is enormous — far larger than any bear you have seen outside a tapestry — its dark brown coat matted and scarred from years of whatever it is bears fight in the deep forest. It moves with a surprising lightness for its bulk, head low, watching you with small dark eyes that convey absolutely nothing resembling tolerance. This is a very dangerous animal and it is between you and the exit.
